processes.name: Ingredients Gathering
processes.description: Collect every ingredient needed for the cake.

tasks.name: Getting Water
tasks.description: We need water for the cake.

tasks.name: Getting Dough
tasks.description: We need dough for the cake.

tasks.name: Getting Eggs
tasks.description: We need eggs for the cake.

processes.name: Mixing
processes.description: Combine all ingredients into a uniform batter.

processes.name: Baking
processes.description: Bake the batter into a finished cake.

tasks.name: Preheating Oven
tasks.description: Bring oven to the correct temperature.

tasks.name: Cooling
tasks.description: Let the cake cool before packaging.

processes.name: Packaging
processes.description: Box and label the finished product.
